title: C418 to FE!N
description: Changes 11 by C418 to FE!N by Travis Scott
body:
# [JOIN THE DISCORD](https://discord.gg/gEjJwKk8gs) IF YOU THINK YOU CAN HELP WITH THE ISSUE BELOW PLEASE
🎵 About this Pack
This resource pack replaces C418’s eerie and unsettling Music Disc 11 with Travis Scott’s high-energy track “FE!N” 🔥. Instead of static and creepy ambience, you’ll hear pure hype every time you spin the disc in your jukebox 🎧💿.

✨ Features

- Replaces Music Disc 11 with FE!N by Travis Scott 🎶

- Client-side only — only players with the pack installed will hear the change 👂

- Perfect for parties, battles, or just vibing in your Minecraft world 🌍⚡

📦 Compatibility

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.7+ only
  
- Doesn’t affect other discs or game sounds
  
- Lightweight and vanilla-friendly

- **THERE IS A PROBLEM WITH THE SONG CUTTING OFF THAT I'M WORKING ON FIXING, THANK YOU FOR YOUR PATIENCE**
  
💿 Bring Travis Scott’s energy straight into your Minecraft jukebox!

[![Parental Advisory - Explicit Content](https://i.postimg.cc/W3tdm9wh/parental-advisory-content.png)](https://i.postimg.cc/W3tdm9wh/parental-advisory-content.png)
